title: Melissa Riegle: Driven by legacy, defined by determination
summary_en: From the very beginning, Melissa Riegle was surrounded by a powerful legacy of engineering excellence.
title_cn: 梅利莎·里格尔：承续传统 坚毅立身

title: EPICS has been impacting students, communities for 30 years
summary_en: Engineering Projects in Community Service — now called simply EPICS — is a transformative program that meets an industry need by equipping students with more than just technical skills but also the crucial professional skills that companies desperately seek.
title_cn: 社区服务工程实践项目（EPICS）三十年来持续影响学生与社区

title: March Edition: Newly Issued Patents
summary_en: Congratulations to Purdue Engineers who recently receive patents on their intellectual property from the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office.

title: Brain-inspired AI hardware by ECE's Roy helps with decision-making for autonomous devices
summary_en: A Purdue University engineer uses the brain's efficiency as inspiration to help autonomous vehicles, such as drones and robots, make crucial, time-sensitive decisions while operating in the field.
title_cn: 电子与计算机工程系罗伊研发的类脑人工智能硬件可助力自主设备决策
